---
title: "Orange Data Mining Project Portfolio"
author: "Anirudh LG"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  github_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
---

# Orange Data Mining Project Portfolio

![Orange](https://img.shields.io/badge/Orange-Data_Mining-orange)
![Machine Learning](https://img.shields.io/badge/Machine-Learning-blue)
![Classification](https://img.shields.io/badge/Classification-Supervised-success)
![Regression](https://img.shields.io/badge/Regression-Predictive-green)
![Clustering](https://img.shields.io/badge/Clustering-Unsupervised-yellow)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Educational-lightgrey)

A comprehensive collection of Machine Learning, Regression, Classification, and Clustering workflows developed using **Orange Data Mining**.

---

# Table of Contents

1. Project Overview
2. Repository Structure
3. Classification Projects
4. Regression Projects
5. Clustering Projects
6. Performance Summary
7. Screenshots
8. Future Improvements

---

# Project Overview

This repository demonstrates:

- Data preprocessing
- Feature engineering
- Classification models
- Regression models
- Clustering techniques
- Model evaluation
- Workflow-based machine learning using Orange

---

# Repository Structure

```text
Orange-Projects/
│
├── datasets/
├── workflows/
│   ├── iris_knn.ows
│   ├── weather_logistic_regression.ows
│   ├── zoo_svm_knn.ows
│   ├── stock_linear_regression.ows
│   ├── kmeans_dbscan.ows
│
├── screenshots/
├── README.Rmd
└── README.md
```

---

# Classification Projects

## Iris Flower Classification (KNN)

### Workflow

```text
File → Select Columns → KNN → Test & Score → Predictions
```

### Results

| Metric | Score |
|----------|---------|
| Accuracy | 0.978 |
| F1 | 0.979 |
| Precision | 0.978 |
| Recall | 0.978 |
| MCC | 0.966 |

### Screenshot

```markdown
![](screenshots/iris_knn_prediction.png)
```

---

## Weather Prediction (Logistic Regression)

### Target
RainToday

### Results

| Metric | Score |
|----------|---------|
| AUC | 1.000 |
| Accuracy | 0.991 |
| F1 | 0.991 |
| MCC | 0.967 |

### Screenshot

```markdown
![](screenshots/weather_logistic_regression.png)
```

---

## Zoo Animal Classification (SVM vs KNN)

### Performance Comparison

| Model | Accuracy |
|---------|---------|
| SVM | 0.980 |
| KNN | 0.940 |

### Conclusion

SVM achieved the best overall performance.

### Screenshot

```markdown
![](screenshots/zoo_svm_knn.png)
```

---

## Titanic Survival Prediction (Neural Network)

| Metric | Score |
|----------|---------|
| Accuracy | 0.784 |
| Precision | 0.821 |
| Recall | 0.784 |

### Screenshot

```markdown
![](screenshots/titanic_neural_network.png)
```

---

## Tennis Surface Prediction (Naive Bayes)

| Metric | Score |
|----------|---------|
| Accuracy | 0.657 |
| F1 | 0.684 |
| MCC | 0.414 |

### Screenshot

```markdown
![](screenshots/tennis_naive_bayes.png)
```

---

# Regression Projects

## Stock Market Price Prediction (Linear Regression)

### Workflow

```text
File → Linear Regression → Test & Score → Predictions
```

### Results

| Metric | Value |
|---------|---------|
| RMSE | 1.855 |
| MAE | 0.917 |
| R² | 0.998 |

### Interpretation

The model explains 99.8% of the variance in stock prices.

### Screenshot

```markdown
![](screenshots/stock_linear_regression.png)
```

---

## Titanic Age Prediction (Decision Tree Regression)

| Metric | Value |
|---------|---------|
| RMSE | 0.154 |
| MAE | 0.108 |
| R² | 0.117 |

### Screenshot

```markdown
![](screenshots/titanic_tree_regression.png)
```

---

# Clustering Projects

## K-Means Clustering

### Silhouette Scores

| Clusters | Score |
|---------|---------|
| 2 | 0.149 |
| 3 | 0.094 |
| 4 | 0.084 |
| 5 | 0.065 |
| 6 | 0.080 |
| 7 | 0.069 |
| 8 | 0.060 |

### Conclusion

The best clustering solution was obtained with **2 clusters**.

### Workflow Image

```markdown
![](screenshots/kmeans_workflow.png)
```

---

## DBSCAN Clustering

### Parameters

| Parameter | Value |
|------------|---------|
| Min Points | 4 |
| Epsilon | 6.28 |
| Distance Metric | Euclidean |

### Workflow Image

```markdown
![](screenshots/dbscan_workflow.png)
```

---

# Performance Summary

| Project | Algorithm | Performance |
|----------|------------|-------------|
| Iris | KNN | 97.8% Accuracy |
| Weather | Logistic Regression | 99.1% Accuracy |
| Zoo | SVM | 98.0% Accuracy |
| Titanic Survival | Neural Network | 78.4% Accuracy |
| Tennis | Naive Bayes | 65.7% Accuracy |
| Stock Market | Linear Regression | R² = 0.998 |
| Titanic Age | Decision Tree | R² = 0.117 |
| Gaming Dataset | K-Means | Silhouette = 0.149 |
| Gaming Dataset | DBSCAN | Density Clustering |

---

# Screenshots Folder

Place your Orange screenshots inside:

```text
screenshots/
```

Suggested names:

```text
iris_knn_prediction.png
weather_logistic_regression.png
zoo_svm_knn.png
titanic_neural_network.png
tennis_naive_bayes.png
stock_linear_regression.png
titanic_tree_regression.png
kmeans_workflow.png
dbscan_workflow.png
```

---

# Future Improvements

- Hyperparameter tuning
- Ensemble learning
- Deep learning models
- Cross-validation experiments
- Automated workflow evaluation

---

# Author

**Your Name**

Machine Learning and Data Mining Projects using Orange Data Mining.

---

# License

This repository is intended for educational, research, and academic purposes.
